source.note: Compact copy of the upstream scenario corpus. The upstream benchmark is an agent/outline benchmark; this package reuses the same repositories as a deterministic structural-grep CLI corpus.

scenarios.name: vscode-extension-host
scenarios.query: How does the extension host communicate with the main process?

scenarios.name: excalidraw-render-update
scenarios.query: How does Excalidraw render and update canvas elements?

scenarios.name: django-queryset-execution
scenarios.query: How does Django's ORM build and execute a query from a QuerySet?

scenarios.name: tokio-runtime-scheduling
scenarios.query: How does tokio schedule and run async tasks on its runtime?

scenarios.name: okhttp-interceptor-chain
scenarios.query: How does OkHttp process a request through its interceptor chain?

scenarios.name: gin-middleware-routing
scenarios.query: Trace Gin request routing end to end: how routes and middleware are registered, how method trees match a request path, how the matched handlers are assigned and executed through Context.Next, and how 404/405 fallback handlers reuse the same chain mechanism.

scenarios.name: alamofire-request-lifecycle
scenarios.query: How does Alamofire build, send, and validate a request?
